meta.question: What's the relationship between Endeavor Real Estate Group and Mayor Watson?

event.question: What's the relationship between Endeavor Real Estate Group and Mayor Watson?

event.description: Find Mayor Watson's filer record in Austin campaign finance data.

source.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, recipient Watson, Kirk P.: 16458 reported contributions, $5,302,288.44 (2022-2024).

event.description: Query contributions from Endeavor Real Estate Group to Watson.

source.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Newman, Jake -> Watson, Kirk P., $450, 04/25/2024.

event.description: Calculate total contributions from Endeavor Real Estate Group employees and analyze the pattern.

event.text: Endeavor Real Estate Group is the single biggest commercial-real-estate bloc in Mayor Kirk P. Watson's donor file. 26 employees, 106 contributions, $45,648.72 since 2022 — almost every check at the $450 individual cap. No one Endeavor employee is in Watson's top-100 donor list; the firm only becomes visible if you roll the employer field up.

citations.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Newman, Jake -> Watson, Kirk P., $450, 04/25/2024.
Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Marsh, Charles -> Watson, Kirk P., $400, 02/28/2022.

event.text: The donations cluster, hard. 24 Endeavor employees wrote $450 checks on April 24-26, 2024 — three days. Two years earlier, 19 wrote $400 checks across a ten-day window in February-March 2022. Those two windows alone account for over 40% of the Endeavor total. This is the signature of a firm-wide ask, not 26 independent supporters arriving at the same conclusion.

citations.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Miller, Arnold Bryce -> Watson, Kirk P., $450, 04/24/2024.
Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Marsh, Charles -> Watson, Kirk P., $400, 02/28/2022.
Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Ellis, Christopher -> Watson, Kirk P., $400, 03/08/2022.

event.text: Most of the giving comes from Endeavor leadership: Managing Principals, Principals, and senior real-estate roles, several of whom show up in three different cycles. The firm itself is a registered Austin city lobby client through 2024 — same building, same masthead, same names. The ledger reads less as 26 individuals and more as one firm using the per-individual cap as a template.

citations.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Thumlert, Jason -> Watson, Kirk P., $450, 11/09/2022.
Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Marsh, Charles -> Watson, Kirk P., $450, 04/25/2024.

citation.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, 106 contributions from 26 individuals reporting Endeavor Real Estate Group employment to Watson, Kirk P., $45,648.72 (2022-2024).
